metaTitle: About Clinique du VR | RV Workshop in Gatineau
metaDescription: About Clinique du VR, an RV workshop in Gatineau since 2013, serving Outaouais, the Ottawa region, and the Laurentides.

hero.title: About Clinique du VR
hero.body: Clinique du VR is a specialized workshop for RV inspection, maintenance, repair, and detailing in Gatineau. The business supports owners of RVs, travel trailers, and caravans with a clear, practical approach focused on lasting work.
hero.imageAlt: Clinique du VR — RV service in Gatineau
hero.caption: Clinique du VR — recreational vehicle service workshop in Gatineau

sections.heading: Technical leadership and experience
sections.body: Clinique du VR has supported RV owners since 2013 with a practical, attentive approach focused on lasting work. The workshop emphasizes clear explanations, a practical assessment of the vehicle's condition, and recommendations adapted to how the RV is actually used.

sections.heading: Garage and liability insurance
sections.body: Clinique du VR carries $2 million in garage and liability insurance. For customers, that adds another level of confidence when leaving an RV, travel trailer, or vehicle at the workshop for inspection, maintenance, repair, or detailing.

sections.heading: Service area
sections.body: Clinique du VR primarily serves Gatineau, as well as the Ottawa region, Outaouais, and the Laurentides depending on the type of file. This regional coverage is useful for pre-purchase inspections, water leak repairs, seasonal maintenance, and pre-sale preparation.

sections.heading: Workshop mission
sections.body: The mission is simple: help RV owners understand the actual condition of their vehicle, prioritize the right work, and avoid unpleasant surprises. That means direct communication, a practical understanding of the issues, and recommendations that take budget, use, and season into account.
